Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 315}Remember that incident about a month ago? Where everyone was standing outside in the middle of the night?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 315}I also went outside, but I don't remember what I was doing at all.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 315}Maybe it was because I was just worried about Kirijo-senpai moving to another country...[n]{f 1 1}
